results.description: MIMConvexStrategy._deposit() (contracts/v3/strategies/MIMConvexStrategy.sol#99-103) ignores return value by convexVault.depositAll(pid,true) (contracts/v3/strategies/MIMConvexStrategy.sol#101)
MIMConvexStrategy._withdrawAll() (contracts/v3/strategies/MIMConvexStrategy.sol#150-152) ignores return value by convexVault.withdrawAll(pid) (contracts/v3/strategies/MIMConvexStrategy.sol#151)

MIMConvexStrategy._claimReward() (contracts/v3/strategies/MIMConvexStrategy.sol#105-107) ignores return value by crvRewards.getReward(address(this),true) (contracts/v3/strategies/MIMConvexStrategy.sol#106)

MIMConvexStrategy._withdraw(uint256) (contracts/v3/strategies/MIMConvexStrategy.sol#154-156) ignores return value by convexVault.withdraw(pid,_amount) (contracts/v3/strategies/MIMConvexStrategy.sol#155)

MIMConvexStrategy._harvest(uint256,uint256) (contracts/v3/strategies/MIMConvexStrategy.sol#125-148) has external calls inside a loop: _rewardToken = IConvexRewards(crvRewards.extraRewards(i)).rewardToken() (contracts/v3/strategies/MIMConvexStrategy.sol#134)
	Calls stack containing the loop:
		BaseStrategy.harvest(uint256,uint256)

	Calls stack containing the loop:
		BaseStrategy.harvest(uint256,uint256)

results.description:
Version constraint 0.6.12 contains known severe issues (https://solidity.readthedocs.io/en/latest/bugs.html)
	- FullInlinerNonExpressionSplitArgumentEvaluationOrder
	- MissingSideEffectsOnSelectorAccess
	- AbiReencodingHeadOverflowWithStaticArrayCleanup
	- DirtyBytesArrayToStorage
	- DataLocationChangeInInternalOverride
	- NestedCalldataArrayAbiReencodingSizeValidation
	- SignedImmutables
	- ABIDecodeTwoDimensionalArrayMemory
	- KeccakCaching
	- EmptyByteArrayCopy
	- DynamicArrayCleanup.
